title: Toyland® 10 In 1 Velvet & Foil Art Set - 10 Art Projects - Creative Toys - Age 5+ (BOYS DESIGNS)
features: Get creative with this 10 in 1 unique velvet and foil art set. The set includes 10 assorted art projects.
Simply peel and use the scraper to add colourful foil accents.
You will get 8 pictures and 2 stickers to get creative with.
There are two assorted designs to collect; the blue boy themed set and a pink girl themed one. Suitable for children ages 5+.

Contents: 3 x large velvet sheets, 1 x medium velvet sheet, 1 x medium peel-able velvet sheet, 2 x small peel-able velvet sheets, 1 x small velvet sheet, 2 x velvet stickers, 6 x foil sheets, 5 x markers and 1 x scraper.
